channel.title: Package Management on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Package Management on My Linux Journey

item.title: List Installed Packages on Void Linux - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to listing installed packages on Void Linux. Uses xbps-query to show all packages, manually installed programs, versions, and orphaned dependencies.

item.title: Install Local XBPS Packages on Void Linux
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing downloaded XBPS packages on Void Linux manually. Uses xbps-rindex to index packages and xbps-install to install locally.
